Bash(powershell.exe -Command "cd ''C:\\Users\\dace\\Desktop\\workspace\\Jhventure\\jhbridge\\codebase\\legacy\\legacy''; venv\\Scripts\\python.exe manage.py shell -c ""
from django.db import connection
cursor = connection.cursor\(\)
cursor.execute\(''''''
CREATE TABLE app_webauthn_credential \(
    id CHAR\(32\) NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
    credential_id_b64 VARCHAR\(512\) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
    public_key_b64 LONGTEXT NOT NULL,
    sign_count INT UNSIGNED NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    device_name VARCHAR\(100\) NOT NULL DEFAULT ''Unknown Device'',
    transports JSON DEFAULT NULL,
    created_at DATETIME\(6\) NOT NULL,
    last_used DATETIME\(6\) DEFAULT NULL,
    user_id INT NOT NULL,
    CONSTRAINT fk_webauthn_user FOREIGN KEY \(user_id\) REFERENCES app_user \(id\) ON DELETE CASCADE
\)
''''''\)
print\(''Table created successfully''\)
""")
